basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Group-C. Candidates with 12th-pass, Degree Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KEA official website cetonline.karnataka.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years. Max: 40 (General), 43 (2A, 2B, 3A, 3B), 45 (SC, ST, Cat-1) years.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44425-83700 (First Division Assistant), Rs. 34100-67700 (Second Division Assistant)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KEA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Karnataka Examination Authority First Division Assistant
